        self.notify_pinkpaw_reward(success=False)
        return self.route_result(success=True)
methods._exit_to_main:
def _exit_to_main(self, ah):
    for _ in range(3):
        ah.click_key('escape')
        ah.delay(1000, check_reward=False)
    ah.delay(1500, check_reward=False)
